title: ASR Outdoor 15L 20L Waterproof Dry Sack Gusseted Bottom Ripstop Nylon Bag
description:
Planning a camping, boating, or water sports trip this year? The ASR Outdoor waterproof dry sack is an ideal storage option for your essentials while doing outdoor activities like camping, hiking, and kayaking. This bag has a capacity of 15 liters so you can count on it to protect your gear from inclement weather and water. Our dry sack is made of durable, ripstop 70D PU-coated nylon designed to protect your essentials. The inside of the bag is also coated and the entire bag comes in a bright green color for added visibility in the dark. The bag features a large gusseted bottom allowing you to store even more gear. The extra pieces of fabric give the bag added strength and room: the sealed size is 14” x 20.5” and the gusset size is 6.5” x 9.75”

ASR Outdoor 15L 20L Waterproof Dry Sack Gusseted Bottom Ripstop Nylon Bag

Planning a camping, boating, or water sports trip this year? The ASR Outdoor waterproof dry sack is an ideal storage option for your essentials while doing outdoor activities like camping, hiking, and kayaking. This bag has a capacity of 15 liters so you can count on it to protect your gear from inclement weather and water.

Key Features

  • 15L CAPACITY DRY BAG - ASR Outdoor waterproof dry sack holds up to 15 liters of personal items; Ideal waterproof storage bag for outdoor activities where essentials may be exposed to moisture and water like boating, kayaking, and camping
  • WATERPROOF MATERIAL - Dry sack is made of durable, Ripstop 70D PU-coated nylon designed to protect your essentials from water; Inside of bag is also coated and entire bag comes in bright green color for high visibility
  • GUSSETED BOTTOM - Bag features large gusseted bottom allowing you to store more gear; Extra pieces of fabric give the bag extra strength and room; Sealed size: 14” x 20.5”; Gusset size: 6.5” x 9.75”
  • SAFE AND SECURE - Strong buckle closure ensures items are secured even during intense travel and movement; Comes with D-ring ideal for attaching items for quick access like whistles, keys, straps, and compasses
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Material: Ripstop 70D nylon; Inside: PU coated nylon; Color: bright green; Capacity: 15L; Sealed size: 14” x 20.5”; Gusset size: 6.5” x 9.75”; Closure type: buckle with D-ring

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRO1520DS
  • UPC: 810131701468
  • Color: Multicolor

Our dry sack is made of durable, ripstop 70D PU-coated nylon designed to protect your essentials. The inside of the bag is also coated and the entire bag comes in a bright green color for added visibility in the dark.

The bag features a large gusseted bottom allowing you to store even more gear. The extra pieces of fabric give the bag added strength and room: the sealed size is 14” x 20.5” and the gusset size is 6.5” x 9.75”.

Each bag also comes with a strong buckle closure to ensure that your items are secured even during intense travel and movement. It features a D-ring ideal for attaching items you may need quick access to like keys, straps, compasses, whistles and other camping accessories. Make sure to grab one of these versatile waterproof bags before your next outdoor adventure!
